calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Off Calendar

Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFFS NEW WEST VENTURES, LLC, JAMES MCALPINE's Motion To Enforce Settlement is adopted as follows:

Plaintiffs New West Ventures, LCC and Jim McAlpine's motion to enforce settlement is granted. Defendants admit that they entered into a settlement agreement requiring them to make a settlement payment of $330,000.00 by January 15, 2020, that the agreement provides it is binding and may be enforced pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, and that they have failed to perform as required. Defendants' argument that plaintiffs' motion is "unnecessary and premature" because they are "in the process of obtaining the settlement funds" is groundless. The court will grant the motion and enter judgment as requested.

The Court signed the proposed order and the proposed judgment submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-27-2020 Continued To Mar-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFFS NEW WEST VENTURES, LLC, JAMES MCALPINE's Motion To Enforce Settlement is continued to March 5, 2020 per agreement of the parties.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Mar-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
